title: Fresh clone verifier
purpose: Define the reproducibility entrypoint that clones a repository/ref into a clean worktree, installs dependencies with npm ci, and runs the configured verification command, which defaults to npm run pnp:verify.

ciMode.rationale: CI runs a fast clone/install/smoke command to verify the fresh-clone mechanism without recursively running the full pnp:verify workflow inside itself. The script default remains npm run pnp:verify for independent reviewers.

nonClaims: This verifier does not activate public theorem emission.
This verifier does not clear Release.UnrestrictedFinalSoundness or ExternalReview.Acceptance.
The CI smoke invocation verifies fresh clone mechanics; independent reviewers can use the default full pnp:verify command.
